pageDescription: Only OpenAI official and OpenAI-compatible providers are supported. Model parameters and rate limits are managed here.
noProvidersHint: Add an OpenAI or OpenAI-compatible provider, then fetch models and test the connection.
onlyOpenAISupported: Only OpenAI official and OpenAI-compatible providers are supported.
field.name: Name
apiKeyNewOrEmpty: Enter new key or leave blank to keep current
apiKeyKeepSaved: If left blank, the system will continue using the saved API Key.
fetchModelsHintEdit: You can reuse the current API Key to fetch models from this provider.
fetchModelsHintNew: After fetching models, you can quickly filter and select using search.
fetchModelsFirst: Fetch models first, then select one to test.
noModelsFetched: No model list yet. Please click "Fetch Models" first.
selectOrTypeModel: Select from list or type manually
completeConnectionInfo: Please select a model and complete connection info first
usingStoredKey: You are currently using the saved API Key. You can test a new model directly without re-entering the key.
